testcase.name: test_query_within_threshold[user_lookup-SELECT id, email, country FROM users WHERE email = (SELECT email FROM users LIMIT 1)]
test_query_within_threshold[order_history-SELECT id, status, total FROM orders WHERE user_id = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20]
test_query_within_threshold[inventory_search-SELECT product_id, name, stock FROM inventory WHERE category = 'electronics' AND stock > 0 LIMIT 50]
test_query_within_threshold[order_with_items-SELECT o.id, o.status, oi.product_id, oi.quantity FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.user_id = 1]

test_query_within_threshold[revenue_by_country-SELECT u.country, SUM(o.total) AS revenue FROM orders o JOIN users u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status = 'paid' GROUP BY u.country ORDER BY revenue DESC]
